notes: Spec-lock: one new module (approval_queue.py -- in-memory dict + append-only JSONL audit + keyring-backed live-mode toggle), two new pages (APPROVALS_PAGE + LIVE_MODE_TOGGLE_PAGE), ~9 new API endpoints, one new config block ([internal].token, default empty == fails closed). ZERO imports from agent/live/*, agent/risk/*, agent/squad/*. Sprint 2 does NOT wire submit() from any pathway.
invariants_pinned: can_send_live_order composes ALL FOUR gates -- test_live_mode_off_invariant.py is P0
Live-mode default is OFF; keyring exception -> False (fail-closed)
enable_ceremony requires acknowledgement AND exact 'ENABLE LIVE MODE' confirmation
disable is one-click -- safety direction always frictionless
submit endpoint gated by internal-only token; empty config -> refuses all
5-minute default timeout; timeouts auto-reap in list_entries + can_send_order
Warning endpoints (/api/live-mode/warning, /api/approvals/warning) readable pre-auth so the ceremony can render
Zero imports from restricted directories (D065 hard invariant)
acceptance: Module tests cover submit / approve / reject / timeout / validation / audit / list-filter
Ceremony tests cover both refuse paths + accept path
Page tests cover pending grid + countdown + ceremony inputs + one-click disable + mobile 700px
API tests cover install-token gate + internal-token fail-closed on empty
All Legal warnings drafted BEFORE QA (D048)
